nodes.context: A street gang founded in London, Ontario, Canada in 2000, involved in drug trafficking, murder, assault, extortion, robbery, burglary, and grand theft.
A street gang mentioned as not associated with the Kipps Lane Crew.

edges.evidence_quote: The colours of the Kipps Lane Crew are red, although the gang is not associated with the Bloods.
edges.context: The text explicitly states that Kipps Lane Crew is not associated with the Bloods, indicating no relationship.
